title: Kylo is Born
note: The day everything changed. You arrived at 7:42am, took one look at the world, and decided it was worth sticking around.

title: First Smile
note: A real, intentional smile — not gas! You grinned at Dad during a diaper change and melted us completely.

title: First Laugh
note: Mom made a silly face and you laughed — a real belly laugh. We played the video on repeat for a week.

title: Rolled Over
note: Tummy to back, then back to tummy. You looked extremely proud of yourself.

title: First Solid Food
note: Sweet potato puree. You made the greatest face — somewhere between delight and disgust — then opened your mouth for more.
